steps: Resuspended cells isolated from the small intestine with 400 µL Fc block (BD Biosciences,Cat# 553142; Franklin Lakes, NJ), 1:200 in FACS buffer.
Wash cells in 500 µL FACS buffer, pellet at 1500 rpm, , 2 minutes , then resuspend in 600 µL of FACS buffer with 1:100 CD45 BUV395 antibody (BD Biosciences, Cat# 564279; Franklin Lakes, NJ).
After 30 minutes, wash cells in 500 µL FACS buffer.
Resuspend in 500 µL of FACS buffer containing propidium iodide (BioLegend, Cat# 421301; San Diego, CA) at 1:10,000.
Sort viable, CD45+ cells on a Sony MA900 Multi-Application Cell Sorter.
creator: Connor Monahan
